title: pelargonium × veniflorum
intro: Pelargonium × veniflorum, also known as Cape Rose or Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids and ascorbic acid, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × veniflorum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is often used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
